titleZh: 上市公司收购管理办法（2006年修订）
titleEn: Measures for the Administration of the Takeover of Listed Companies (2006 Revision)
issuingBodyZh: 中国证券监督管理委员会
summaryZh: 上市公司收购监管规则的重要奠基文本，系统规定权益变动披露、要约收购、协议收购和管理层收购制度。
summaryEn: A foundational takeover-rule text governing disclosure of shareholding changes, tender offers, negotiated acquisitions, and management buyouts of listed companies.
applicablePeriodZh: 2006年9月1日起施行，后经多轮修正并演进为 2020 年现行文本。
applicablePeriodEn: Effective from September 1, 2006, and later revised multiple times before evolving into the 2020 current text.
